column1: -- Step 1: Identify all contract accounts (contracts that received FUNCTION_CALL before the new period)
AND block_date <= '2025-08-17'  -- cutoff for known contracts
-- Step 2: Find all users who interacted with those contracts
WHERE receiver_account_id IN (SELECT contract_id FROM contract_accounts)
AND signer_account_id NOT IN (SELECT contract_id FROM contract_accounts)  -- exclude contract signers
